message:
feat: add C-callable export wrappers for @logic_table methods

- Generate export fn wrappers at module level after struct definition
- Use callconv(.c) for C ABI compatibility
- Mark export sections with __logic_table_exports_begin/end__ markers
- Update extraction logic to capture export wrappers in static library
- Change struct methods to pub fn (export fn inside struct doesn't work)

Note: @logic_table codegen still has type issues that need addressing
